popularStory.headline: Simon de Montague According to Wiki
popularStory.description: Simon de Montagu, 1st Baron Montagu (died 1316) (alias de Montagu, de Montacute, Latinized to de Monte Acuto ("from the sharp mountain"), from the French mont aigu, with identical meaning,[1]) was sum …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu於1249年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古時，他的父親William de Montacute-56歲，母親Bertha or Berta-60歲。他於大約1270年與Hawise St Amand在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年9月26日在英國薩默塞特伯頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu于1249年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古时，他的父亲William de Montacute-56岁，母亲Bertha or Berta-60岁。他于大约1270年与Hawise St Amand在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年9月26日在英国薩默塞特伯頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu was born in 1249, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, his father, William de Montacute, was -56 and his mother, Bertha or Berta, was -60. He married Hawise St Amand about 1270, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 September 1316, in Burton, Somerset, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu est né en 1249, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William de Montacute, avait -56 ans et sa mère, Bertha or Berta, avait -60 ans. Il a épousé Hawise St Amand environ 1270, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1316, à Burton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1270 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England Hawise St Amand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montaguが1249年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーで生まれた時，父William de Montacuteは-56歳，母Bertha or Bertaは-60歳であった。約1270年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーでHawise St Amandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年9月26日にイギリスソメルセトブルトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu(이)가 1249년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Montacute(은)는 -56세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha or Berta(은)는 -60세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 Hawise St Amand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 9월 26일 영국 서머세트 버턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu nasceu em 1249, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Montacute, tinha -56 anos e sua mãe, Bertha or Berta, tinha -60 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise St Amand aproximadamente 1270, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1316, em Burton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Montagu 1st Baron Montagu родился в 1249 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Montacute было -56 год, а матери, которую звали Bertha or Berta, -60. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise St Amand около 1270 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 сентября 1316 г. в местности буртон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.
